title: clerodendrum gibbosum
intro: Clerodendrum gibbosum, also known as the Butterfly Bush or Glory Bower, is a tropical flowering plant native to the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum gibbosum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing with oils and creams.
